title: Create: Stuffz
description: [6.0.0] a create addon that adds old things from create and custom soups
body:
**unfortunately no longer maintained**

#  **THIS MOD BUFFS TOOL RECIPES! (and softlocks you from crafting a diamond pickaxe)**

i suggest not downloading it

---

THIS MOD REQUIRES CREATE! (omg)

still in development

CREDITS TO CREATE, CREDITS TO CREATE WIKI (for the mod logo) CREDITS TO MCREATOR, CREDITS TO VALVE AND ITS GAME HALF-LIFE 2, i do not own the pictures of the Lapis Sheet, the Integrated Circuit or the creature "Headcrab" from Half-Life 2.

(if you want to support me, just download and try the mod and that'll support me a lot!)

also i think you should download jei too cuz it helps with recipes alot since i didnt put photos of the recipes in the gallery of this mod page



WHAT IT HAS:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Emerald, Lapis and Netherite Sheet (which doesnt do anything for now)

-Headcrab (with raw and cooked meat)

-Covidoid (basically a plant spawns in plains biomes)

-Integrated Circuit (used to make rotation speed controller with a mechanical crafter)

-Magic Paper (which can transform things magically, like turning any grass/dirt type to netherite block by mixing)

-Big Bowl (used for making Big Bowl of Covidovid and Helelele Soup)

-Covidovid (the Covidoid's pressed form)

-Covidoid Leaves (by mixing Covidoid, its used to make the Helelele Soup)

-Gabbro (with its variants; cobblestone, polished, bricks, fancy, pillar, paved, layered, chiseled, mossy and overgrown)

-Dolomite (with its variants; cobblestone, polished, bricks, fancy, pillar, paved, layered, chiseled, mossy and overgrown)

-Infested Wasteland biome

-Infected Log, Wood, Planks, Dirt, Grass Block and Leaves

-Creative Soap, Soap and Bitten Soap

-"Infested Waste" dimension

-Limesand

-Ingot Mold

-Mold of Emerald, Lapis and Diamond Ingot

-Modern Debris

-Compressed Air Tools

-Compressed Air (block)

-Compressed Air, Emerald, Lapis, and Diamond Ingot

-Compressed Air, Emerald, Lapis, and Diamond Nugget

-Bottle of Air

-Bottle of Compressed Air

</details>
